template.loan-approval.name: Loan Approval
template.loan-approval.description: Score a loan application through hard-reject screening, credit-band routing, affordability checks, and employment verification — a realistic multi-step decision graph you can adapt to your own underwriting rules.
template.loan-approval.fact.annual-incom: Verified gross annual income in the base currency unit.
Requested loan principal in the base currency unit.
template.loan-approval.fact.employment-y: Years at current employer. Optional; defaults to 0 when absent.
template.loan-approval.fact.existing-deb: Existing annual debt obligations (sum of yearly payments). Optional; defaults to 0.
template.loan-approval.fact.has-bankrupt: Whether the applicant has a bankruptcy on record. Optional; defaults to false.
template.loan-approval.concept.dti-ratio: Debt-to-income ratio: existing_debt / annual_income. Lower is safer.
template.loan-approval.concept.loan-to-i: Requested loan relative to annual income: loan_amount / annual_income.
template.loan-approval.concept.is-prime-: True when credit_score >= 740 — prime applicants can clear employment review on credit alone.
template.loan-approval.concept.stable-em: True when employment_years >= 2 — used by the employment-verification gate.
template.loan-approval.msg.approved: Loan approved at the standard risk tier.
template.loan-approval.msg.manual-review: Application routed to a human underwriter for manual review.
template.loan-approval.msg.rejected-bank: Rejected: a bankruptcy on record is an automatic decline.
template.loan-approval.msg.rejected-cred: Rejected: credit score is below the minimum threshold (580).
template.loan-approval.msg.rejected-affo: Rejected: debt-to-income or loan-to-income exceeds the allowed limits.
template.loan-approval.sample.prime-appr: Expected: APPROVED — clears credit, affordability, and employment.
template.loan-approval.sample.subprime-r: Expected: MANUAL_REVIEW — credit below 660 always goes to a human.
template.loan-approval.sample.bankruptcy: Bankruptcy on record, strong income and credit
Expected: REJECTED — bankruptcy is an automatic decline.
template.loan-approval.sample.affordabil: Expected: REJECTED — loan-to-income far exceeds the 4x limit.
template.loan-approval.contract.in.appli: Applicant unique identifier. Must be non-empty; used for audit trails.
template.loan-approval.contract.in.credi: Credit bureau score (300–850). Required. Scores below 580 are auto-rejected.
template.loan-approval.contract.in.annua: Verified gross annual income in the base currency unit. Must be > 0.
template.loan-approval.contract.in.loan-: Requested loan principal in the base currency unit. Must be > 0.
template.loan-approval.contract.in.emplo: Years at current employer. Optional; defaults to 0 (treated as unstable).
template.loan-approval.contract.in.exist: Existing annual debt obligations. Optional; defaults to 0 (no debt).
template.loan-approval.contract.in.has-b: Whether a bankruptcy is on record. Optional; defaults to false.
template.loan-approval.contract.out.appr: Approved principal. Present only when decision is 'approve'.
template.loan-approval.contract.out.risk: Risk tier of the outcome: 'standard' (approved) or 'manual' (review).
template.loan-approval.contract.notes: P99 SLA is 15 ms (engine only, excluding network and fact fetches). Thresholds (credit 580/660/740, DTI 0.43, loan-to-income 4x) are illustrative — tune them to your own risk policy.
template.loan-approval.test.bankruptcy-d: has_bankruptcy = true short-circuits screening → REJECTED regardless of other fields.
template.loan-approval.test.affordabilit: $50k income, $400k loan exceeds the 4x loan-to-income limit → REJECTED.
template.loan-approval.test.employment-r: Credit 680 with only 1y employment (and < 740) clears affordability but falls to MANUAL_REVIEW.
